phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Tone as a premium analog-style EQ inspired by a Pultec EQP-1A, with musical preset modes and a warm ivory-and-gold hardware aesthetic.
Defined a musical analog EQ architecture, selected WebView for the boutique hardware-style UI, and planned phased implementation for preset modes and tone shaping.
Created the first Nova Tone UI spec, style guide, and premium analog-hardware WebView mockup with the Vocal, Bass, Air, and Master family mode layout.
Implemented the first Nova Tone build with WebView UI bindings, live output metering, cache-busted loading, and the defined Vocal, Bass, Air, and Master preset mappings.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView is the best fit for Nova Tone because the plugin needs a premium boutique hardware look in the same family as Space By Nova, with refined ivory-and-gold materials, tactile sectioned controls, and a polished analog presentation.
